; Alessio Faraci (https://github.com/alefaraci)
; SPDX-License-Identifier: GPL-3.0-only
; Modified: 2026-07-14
;
; Requires: https://github.com/asivery/rm-xovi-extensions

AFFECT [[1224665461898798997]]
	TRAVERSE [[8397993708429497603]]#[[6504254477]]
		LOCATE AFTER ALL
		INSERT {
			‾&6502786168&‾ {
				‾&5972374&‾: regNavHist
				property ‾&197102514&‾ backArr: []
				property ‾&197102514&‾ fwdArr: []
				property ‾&197088788&‾ backLen: 0
				property ‾&197088788&‾ fwdLen: 0
				property ‾&7083178290016&‾ prevKey: ""
				property ‾&6503679477&‾ navigating: ‾&214625660372&‾
				property ‾&7083178290016&‾ curKey: {
					‾&197102514&‾ ‾&180973&‾ = ‾&254547437090201330&‾.‾&7712934851008712&‾;
					‾&197102514&‾ ‾&180985&‾ = ‾&254547437090201330&‾.‾&6504167078&‾;
					‾&5972376&‾ (!‾&180973&‾ || ‾&180985&‾ < 0) ‾&7083121450889&‾ "";
					‾&197102514&‾ ‾&180980&‾ = ‾&180973&‾.‾&254533375641282938&‾(‾&180985&‾);
					‾&7083121450889&‾ ‾&180980&‾ ? ‾&180980&‾ : "";
				}
				function resolveIdx(‾&197090674&‾) {
					‾&197102514&‾ ‾&180973&‾ = ‾&254547437090201330&‾.‾&7712934851008712&‾;
					‾&5972376&‾ (!‾&180973&‾ || !‾&197090674&‾) ‾&7083121450889&‾ -1;
					try {
						‾&197102514&‾ ‾&180978&‾ = ‾&180973&‾.‾&254543134822321786&‾(‾&197090674&‾);
						‾&5972376&‾ (‾&7083223278816&‾ ‾&180978&‾ === ‾&"7082983611378&‾ && ‾&180978&‾ >= 0 && ‾&180973&‾.‾&254533375641282938&‾(‾&180978&‾) === ‾&197090674&‾) ‾&7083121450889&‾ ‾&180978&‾;
						‾&7083121450889&‾ -1;
					} catch (‾&180974&‾) { ‾&7083121450889&‾ -1; }
				}
				function resolves(‾&197090674&‾) { ‾&7083121450889&‾ regNavHist.resolveIdx(‾&197090674&‾) >= 0; }
				function validCount(‾&197080206&‾) { ‾&197102514&‾ n = 0; ‾&197085552&‾ (‾&197102514&‾ ‾&180978&‾ = 0; ‾&180978&‾ < ‾&197080206&‾.‾&7082886407723&‾; ‾&180978&‾++) ‾&5972376&‾ (regNavHist.resolves(‾&197080206&‾[‾&180978&‾])) n++; ‾&7083121450889&‾ n; }
				function peekNum(‾&197080206&‾) { ‾&197085552&‾ (‾&197102514&‾ ‾&180978&‾ = ‾&197080206&‾.‾&7082886407723&‾ - 1; ‾&180978&‾ >= 0; ‾&180978&‾--) { ‾&197102514&‾ ‾&197088462&‾ = regNavHist.resolveIdx(‾&197080206&‾[‾&180978&‾]); ‾&5972376&‾ (‾&197088462&‾ >= 0) ‾&7083121450889&‾ ‾&197088462&‾ + 1; } ‾&7083121450889&‾ 0; }
				function popValid(isBack) {
					‾&197102514&‾ ‾&197080206&‾ = (isBack ? regNavHist.backArr : regNavHist.fwdArr).‾&214641468857&‾();
					‾&197102514&‾ ‾&197090674&‾ = "";
					‾&214646069090&‾ (‾&197080206&‾.‾&7082886407723&‾ > 0) { ‾&197102514&‾ ‾&180980&‾ = ‾&197080206&‾.‾&197096440&‾(); ‾&5972376&‾ (regNavHist.resolves(‾&180980&‾)) { ‾&197090674&‾ = ‾&180980&‾; ‾&214621519406&‾; } }
					‾&5972376&‾ (isBack) { regNavHist.backArr = ‾&197080206&‾; regNavHist.backLen = ‾&197080206&‾.‾&7082886407723&‾; }
					‾&6503784146&‾ { regNavHist.fwdArr = ‾&197080206&‾; regNavHist.fwdLen = ‾&197080206&‾.‾&7082886407723&‾; }
					‾&7083121450889&‾ ‾&197090674&‾;
				}
				function ‾&7082701001648&‾() {
					‾&197102514&‾ ‾&197090674&‾ = regNavHist.popValid(‾&6504329801&‾);
					‾&5972376&‾ (‾&197090674&‾ !== "") {
						‾&197102514&‾ ‾&197088462&‾ = regNavHist.resolveIdx(‾&197090674&‾);
						‾&5972376&‾ (‾&197088462&‾ >= 0) {
							regNavHist.fwdArr.‾&6504189257&‾(regNavHist.curKey); regNavHist.fwdLen = regNavHist.fwdArr.‾&7082886407723&‾;
							regNavHist.navigating = ‾&6504329801&‾;
							‾&254547437090201330&‾.‾&7713405014271992&‾(‾&197088462&‾, ‾&14175747548438644067&‾.‾&10593835380864769165&‾.‾&7442916920529273295&‾);
							‾&8399923449641527401&‾.‾&214644635174&‾ = ‾&197088462&‾;
							‾&8399923449641527401&‾.‾&8400080725944051707&‾(‾&197088462&‾);
						}
					}
				}
				function goForward() {
					‾&197102514&‾ ‾&197090674&‾ = regNavHist.popValid(‾&214625660372&‾);
					‾&5972376&‾ (‾&197090674&‾ !== "") {
						‾&197102514&‾ ‾&197088462&‾ = regNavHist.resolveIdx(‾&197090674&‾);
						‾&5972376&‾ (‾&197088462&‾ >= 0) {
							regNavHist.backArr.‾&6504189257&‾(regNavHist.curKey); regNavHist.backLen = regNavHist.backArr.‾&7082886407723&‾;
							regNavHist.navigating = ‾&6504329801&‾;
							‾&254547437090201330&‾.‾&7713405014271992&‾(‾&197088462&‾, ‾&14175747548438644067&‾.‾&10593835380864769165&‾.‾&7442916920529273295&‾);
							‾&8399923449641527401&‾.‾&214644635174&‾ = ‾&197088462&‾;
							‾&8399923449641527401&‾.‾&8400080725944051707&‾(‾&197088462&‾);
						}
					}
				}
				‾&428051690305612204&‾ {
					‾&7083194890448&‾: ‾&233745975898428&‾
					function onRegNavBack() { regNavHist.‾&7082701001648&‾() }
					function onRegNavForward() { regNavHist.goForward() }
				}
				property ‾&7083178290016&‾ regCurDoc: {
					‾&197102514&‾ ‾&180973&‾ = ‾&254547437090201330&‾.‾&7712934851008712&‾;
					‾&7083121450889&‾ (‾&180973&‾ && ‾&180973&‾.‾&5972374&‾) ? ‾&180973&‾.‾&5972374&‾ : "";
				}
				function regDocResolves(‾&214623780460&‾) {
					‾&5972376&‾ (!‾&214623780460&‾) ‾&7083121450889&‾ ‾&214625660372&‾;
					try {
						‾&5972376&‾ (‾&7083223278816&‾ ‾&233694067165438&‾ !== ‾&"254550717068498203&‾ && ‾&233694067165438&‾ && ‾&233694067165438&‾.‾&8399431778896295215&‾) {
							‾&197102514&‾ ‾&180974&‾ = ‾&233694067165438&‾.‾&8399431778896295215&‾(‾&214623780460&‾);
							‾&7083121450889&‾ ‾&180974&‾ ? ‾&6504329801&‾ : ‾&214625660372&‾;
						}
					} catch (err) { ‾&7083121450889&‾ ‾&6504329801&‾; }
					‾&7083121450889&‾ ‾&6504329801&‾;
				}
				property ‾&197088788&‾ regDocBackN: {
					‾&197102514&‾ nv = ‾&254540341572282132&‾;
					‾&5972376&‾ (!nv || !nv.regDocBackArr) ‾&7083121450889&‾ 0;
					‾&197102514&‾ ‾&197080206&‾ = nv.regDocBackArr;
					‾&197102514&‾ ‾&180972&‾ = 0;
					‾&197085552&‾ (‾&197102514&‾ ‾&180978&‾ = 0; ‾&180978&‾ < ‾&197080206&‾.‾&7082886407723&‾; ‾&180978&‾++) { ‾&5972376&‾ (‾&197080206&‾[‾&180978&‾] && regNavHist.regDocResolves(‾&197080206&‾[‾&180978&‾].‾&214623780460&‾)) ‾&180972&‾++; }
					‾&7083121450889&‾ ‾&180972&‾;
				}
				function regDocTrack() {
					‾&197102514&‾ did = regNavHist.regCurDoc;
					‾&5972376&‾ (did === "") ‾&7083121450889&‾;
					‾&197102514&‾ nv = ‾&254540341572282132&‾;
					‾&5972376&‾ (!nv) ‾&7083121450889&‾;
					‾&197102514&‾ prevId = nv.regDocCurId ? nv.regDocCurId : "";
					‾&5972376&‾ (prevId !== did) {
						‾&5972376&‾ (nv.regDocNavigating) {
							nv.regDocNavigating = ‾&214625660372&‾;
						} ‾&6503784146&‾ ‾&5972376&‾ (prevId !== "") {
							‾&197102514&‾ ‾&197080206&‾ = (nv.regDocBackArr && nv.regDocBackArr.‾&7082886407723&‾) ? nv.regDocBackArr.‾&214641468857&‾() : [];
							‾&197080206&‾.‾&6504189257&‾({ ‾&214623780460&‾: prevId });
							‾&5972376&‾ (‾&197080206&‾.‾&7082886407723&‾ > 100) ‾&197080206&‾.‾&214641325223&‾();
							nv.regDocBackArr = ‾&197080206&‾;
						}
					}
					nv.regDocCurId = did;
				}
				function regDocGoBack() {
					‾&197102514&‾ nv = ‾&254540341572282132&‾;
					‾&5972376&‾ (!nv) ‾&7083121450889&‾;
					‾&197102514&‾ ‾&197080206&‾ = (nv.regDocBackArr && nv.regDocBackArr.‾&7082886407723&‾) ? nv.regDocBackArr.‾&214641468857&‾() : [];
					‾&197102514&‾ chosen = ‾&6504117156&‾;
					‾&214646069090&‾ (‾&197080206&‾.‾&7082886407723&‾ > 0) { ‾&197102514&‾ ‾&180974&‾ = ‾&197080206&‾.‾&197096440&‾(); ‾&5972376&‾ (‾&180974&‾ && regNavHist.regDocResolves(‾&180974&‾.‾&214623780460&‾)) { chosen = ‾&180974&‾; ‾&214621519406&‾; } }
					nv.regDocBackArr = ‾&197080206&‾;
					‾&5972376&‾ (!chosen) ‾&7083121450889&‾;
					nv.regDocNavigating = ‾&6504329801&‾;
					try {
						‾&5972376&‾ (‾&7083223278816&‾ ‾&2918312801265623842&‾ !== ‾&"254550717068498203&‾ && ‾&2918312801265623842&‾ && ‾&2918312801265623842&‾.‾&15633749529890334145&‾)
							‾&2918312801265623842&‾.‾&15633749529890334145&‾(‾&6504254477&‾.‾&7712934851008712&‾, ‾&6504254477&‾.‾&477346483278306569&‾);
					} catch (err) {  }
					try { ‾&254540341572282132&‾.‾&7712989590835962&‾.‾&6504147419&‾(chosen.‾&214623780460&‾); }
					catch (err2) { nv.regDocNavigating = ‾&214625660372&‾; }
				}
				onRegCurDocChanged: regNavHist.regDocTrack()
				‾&254480451320573660&‾.‾&495334332051582499&‾: regNavHist.regDocTrack()
				onCurKeyChanged: {
					‾&5972376&‾ (curKey === "") { regNavHist.backArr = []; regNavHist.backLen = 0; regNavHist.fwdArr = []; regNavHist.fwdLen = 0; prevKey = ""; }
					‾&6503784146&‾ ‾&5972376&‾ (prevKey === "") { prevKey = curKey; }
					‾&6503784146&‾ ‾&5972376&‾ (navigating) { navigating = ‾&214625660372&‾; prevKey = curKey; }
					‾&6503784146&‾ ‾&5972376&‾ (curKey !== prevKey) {
						regNavHist.backArr.‾&6504189257&‾(prevKey); regNavHist.backLen = regNavHist.backArr.‾&7082886407723&‾;
						regNavHist.fwdArr = []; regNavHist.fwdLen = 0; prevKey = curKey;
					}
				}
			}
		}
	END TRAVERSE
	TRAVERSE [[8397993708429497603]]#[[6504254477]] > [[6502786168]]#[[15549782143769420265]]
		LOCATE AFTER ALL
		INSERT {
			‾&254501108490678590&‾ {
				‾&5972374&‾: regBackBtn
				‾&233748328658231&‾: ‾&8399923449641527401&‾.‾&233748328658231&‾
				‾&233721384511543&‾.‾&7082507142622&‾: ‾&8399923449641527401&‾.‾&197100796&‾
				‾&233721384511543&‾.‾&15692798426932296956&‾: 12
				‾&233721384511543&‾.‾&6504027668&‾: regDocBackBtn.‾&214640173127&‾
				‾&233721384511543&‾.‾&8399743405844438450&‾: 4
				‾&7082729686082&‾: 74
				‾&214646099849&‾: backRow.‾&214646099849&‾ + 28
				‾&180995&‾: 100000
				‾&7083116119249&‾: 12
				‾&214622605608&‾: ‾&"503220030291830651&‾
				‾&233739540775906&‾: {
					‾&197102514&‾ ‾&180973&‾ = ‾&254547437090201330&‾.‾&7712934851008712&‾;
					‾&197102514&‾ _pc = ‾&180973&‾ ? ‾&180973&‾.‾&254543134818768527&‾ : 0;
					‾&197102514&‾ _bl = regNavHist.backLen;
					‾&197102514&‾ _ck = regNavHist.curKey;
					‾&7083121450889&‾ regNavHist.validCount(regNavHist.backArr) > 0 ? 1.0 : 0.3;
				}
				‾&197063777&‾ {
					‾&5972374&‾: backRow
					‾&233721384511543&‾.‾&7712879746914881&‾: ‾&7083038346995&‾
					‾&233744706647566&‾: 12
					‾&214591687532&‾ { ‾&233721384511543&‾.‾&3441383163516681764&‾: ‾&7083038346995&‾.‾&3441383163516681764&‾; ‾&214646099849&‾: 42; ‾&7082729686082&‾: 42; ‾&7713012679492661&‾: ‾&214591687532&‾.‾&13563680926116790904&‾; ‾&7083172477658&‾: ‾&"5203726458251154181&‾ }
					‾&6503165774&‾ {
						‾&233721384511543&‾.‾&3441383163516681764&‾: ‾&7083038346995&‾.‾&3441383163516681764&‾
						‾&6504315758&‾: {
							‾&197102514&‾ ‾&180973&‾ = ‾&254547437090201330&‾.‾&7712934851008712&‾;
							‾&197102514&‾ _pc = ‾&180973&‾ ? ‾&180973&‾.‾&254543134818768527&‾ : 0;
							‾&197102514&‾ _bl = regNavHist.backLen;
							‾&197102514&‾ _ck = regNavHist.curKey;
							‾&197102514&‾ n = regNavHist.peekNum(regNavHist.backArr);
							‾&7083121450889&‾ n > 0 ? ("Back to page " + n) : ‾&"6502513850&‾;
						}
						‾&6503823200&‾.pointSize: 21
					}
				}
				‾&254494525842443467&‾ {
					‾&233721384511543&‾.‾&6503816592&‾: ‾&7083038346995&‾
					‾&254542236275632405&‾: () => regNavHist.‾&7082701001648&‾()
				}
			}
			‾&254501108490678590&‾ {
				‾&5972374&‾: regDocBackBtn
				‾&233748328658231&‾: ‾&8399923449641527401&‾.‾&233748328658231&‾
				‾&233721384511543&‾.‾&7082507142622&‾: ‾&8399923449641527401&‾.‾&197100796&‾
				‾&233721384511543&‾.‾&15692798426932296956&‾: 12
				‾&233721384511543&‾.‾&6504027668&‾: ‾&8399923449641527401&‾.‾&6504027668&‾
				‾&233721384511543&‾.‾&8399743405844438450&‾: 40
				‾&7082729686082&‾: 74
				‾&214646099849&‾: 74
				‾&180995&‾: 100000
				‾&7083116119249&‾: 12
				‾&214622605608&‾: ‾&"503220030291830651&‾
				‾&233739540775906&‾: regNavHist.regDocBackN > 0 ? 1.0 : 0.3
				‾&214591687532&‾ {
					‾&233721384511543&‾.‾&7712879746914881&‾: ‾&7083038346995&‾
					‾&214646099849&‾: 42
					‾&7082729686082&‾: 42
					‾&7713012679492661&‾: ‾&214591687532&‾.‾&13563680926116790904&‾
					‾&7083172477658&‾: ‾&"5203999904325690724&‾
					‾&7713532151049593&‾: 180
				}
				‾&254494525842443467&‾ {
					‾&233721384511543&‾.‾&6503816592&‾: ‾&7083038346995&‾
					‾&254542236275632405&‾: () => regNavHist.regDocGoBack()
				}
			}
			‾&254501108490678590&‾ {
				‾&233748328658231&‾: ‾&8399923449641527401&‾.‾&233748328658231&‾
				‾&233721384511543&‾.‾&7082507142622&‾: ‾&8399923449641527401&‾.‾&197100796&‾
				‾&233721384511543&‾.‾&15692798426932296956&‾: 12
				‾&233721384511543&‾.‾&214640173127&‾: ‾&8399923449641527401&‾.‾&214640173127&‾
				‾&233721384511543&‾.‾&499747351624466981&‾: 40
				‾&7082729686082&‾: 74
				‾&214646099849&‾: fwdRow.‾&214646099849&‾ + 28
				‾&180995&‾: 100000
				‾&7083116119249&‾: 12
				‾&214622605608&‾: ‾&"503220030291830651&‾
				‾&233739540775906&‾: {
					‾&197102514&‾ ‾&180973&‾ = ‾&254547437090201330&‾.‾&7712934851008712&‾;
					‾&197102514&‾ _pc = ‾&180973&‾ ? ‾&180973&‾.‾&254543134818768527&‾ : 0;
					‾&197102514&‾ _fl = regNavHist.fwdLen;
					‾&197102514&‾ _ck = regNavHist.curKey;
					‾&7083121450889&‾ regNavHist.validCount(regNavHist.fwdArr) > 0 ? 1.0 : 0.3;
				}
				‾&197063777&‾ {
					‾&5972374&‾: fwdRow
					‾&233721384511543&‾.‾&7712879746914881&‾: ‾&7083038346995&‾
					‾&233744706647566&‾: 12
					‾&6503165774&‾ {
						‾&233721384511543&‾.‾&3441383163516681764&‾: ‾&7083038346995&‾.‾&3441383163516681764&‾
						‾&6504315758&‾: {
							‾&197102514&‾ ‾&180973&‾ = ‾&254547437090201330&‾.‾&7712934851008712&‾;
							‾&197102514&‾ _pc = ‾&180973&‾ ? ‾&180973&‾.‾&254543134818768527&‾ : 0;
							‾&197102514&‾ _fl = regNavHist.fwdLen;
							‾&197102514&‾ _ck = regNavHist.curKey;
							‾&197102514&‾ n = regNavHist.peekNum(regNavHist.fwdArr);
							‾&7083121450889&‾ n > 0 ? ("Forward to page " + n) : "Forward";
						}
						‾&6503823200&‾.pointSize: 21
					}
					‾&214591687532&‾ { ‾&233721384511543&‾.‾&3441383163516681764&‾: ‾&7083038346995&‾.‾&3441383163516681764&‾; ‾&214646099849&‾: 42; ‾&7082729686082&‾: 42; ‾&7713012679492661&‾: ‾&214591687532&‾.‾&13563680926116790904&‾; ‾&7083172477658&‾: ‾&"5702276458909383512&‾ }
				}
				‾&254494525842443467&‾ {
					‾&233721384511543&‾.‾&6503816592&‾: ‾&7083038346995&‾
					‾&254542236275632405&‾: () => regNavHist.goForward()
				}
			}
		}
	END TRAVERSE
END AFFECT


AFFECT [[11313888899523275277]]
	TRAVERSE [[8397993708429497603]]
		LOCATE AFTER ALL
		INSERT {
			signal regNavBack()
			signal regNavForward()
		}
	END TRAVERSE
END AFFECT

AFFECT [[17298303916558156758]]
	TRAVERSE [[254504370080162629]]
		LOCATE BEFORE ALL
		INSERT {
			‾&8545339034058226003&‾ {
				‾&5972374&‾: navHistoryBack
				‾&8399878573055752961&‾: "navHistory-back"
				‾&233726547792244&‾: !‾&254549375155946341&‾.‾&16735792760298061570&‾
				‾&7712927726759444&‾: 2 * ‾&254549375155946341&‾.‾&496707965879903317&‾
				‾&254526613107157226&‾: ‾&5971598&‾.‾&214638019283&‾(1, 0)
				‾&6503646466&‾: ‾&5971598&‾.‾&6504243191&‾(0, 0, ‾&254549375155946341&‾.‾&214646099849&‾, ‾&254549375155946341&‾.‾&7082729686082&‾)
				‾&233727659172727&‾: 5
				‾&495358363329399331&‾: ‾&233745975898428&‾.regNavBack()
			}
			‾&8545339034058226003&‾ {
				‾&5972374&‾: navHistoryForward
				‾&8399878573055752961&‾: "navHistory-forward"
				‾&233726547792244&‾: !‾&254549375155946341&‾.‾&16735792760298061570&‾
				‾&7712927726759444&‾: 2 * ‾&254549375155946341&‾.‾&496707965879903317&‾
				‾&254526613107157226&‾: ‾&5971598&‾.‾&214638019283&‾(-1, 0)
				‾&6503646466&‾: ‾&5971598&‾.‾&6504243191&‾(0, 0, ‾&254549375155946341&‾.‾&214646099849&‾, ‾&254549375155946341&‾.‾&7082729686082&‾)
				‾&233727659172727&‾: 5
				‾&495358363329399331&‾: ‾&233745975898428&‾.regNavForward()
			}
		}
	END TRAVERSE
END AFFECT



AFFECT [[8850026134298937527]]
	TRAVERSE [[8397993708429497603]]
	LOCATE BEFORE ALL
	INSERT {
		property ‾&197102514&‾ regDocBackArr: []
		property ‾&7083178290016&‾ regDocCurId: ""
		property ‾&6503679477&‾ regDocNavigating: ‾&214625660372&‾
	}
	END TRAVERSE
END AFFECT
